title.en: SFDA Organizes Two Specialized Workshops on Clinical Trials and Healthcare Technologies in the Medical Devices Sector at GHE
title.zh: SFDA在GHE举办医疗器械临床试验与医疗技术两场专题研讨会

summary.en: The Saudi Food and Drug Authority (SFDA) conducted two specialized workshops at the Global Health Exhibition (GHE) addressing clinical trial requirements and emerging healthcare technologies for medical devices. The sessions targeted industry stakeholders, including manufacturers and investigators, to clarify regulatory expectations and foster compliance. Participants are encouraged to review workshop outcomes and align their clinical investigation and technology adoption practices with SFDA guidance.
summary.zh: 沙特食品药品监督管理局（SFDA）在全球健康展览会（GHE）期间举办了两场专题研讨会，重点讲解医疗器械临床试验要求与创新医疗技术。研讨会面向制造商、研究者等行业相关方，旨在阐明监管期望并促进合规。建议参与者关注研讨会成果，将临床研究与技术引进实践与SFDA指南保持一致。

title.en: SFDA and AAMI Sign MoU to Advance Medical Device Standards
title.zh: 沙特食品药品监督管理局与美国AAMI签署谅解备忘录，推进医疗器械标准合作

summary.en: The Saudi Food and Drug Authority (SFDA) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Association for the Advancement of Medical Instrumentation (AAMI) to strengthen collaboration on medical device standards. The partnership aims to harmonize regulatory requirements, enhance device safety and performance, and promote the adoption of international best practices in Saudi Arabia. Medical device manufacturers and importers should note that future SFDA guidance may increasingly reference AAMI standards, which could affect product certification and compliance. No immediate regulatory changes have been announced, but stakeholders are advised to monitor SFDA updates for potential new requirements.
summary.zh: 沙特食品药品监督管理局（SFDA）与美国医疗器械促进协会（AAMI）签署了一份谅解备忘录，旨在加强医疗器械标准领域的合作。双方将致力于协调监管要求，提升器械安全性与性能，并推动在沙特阿拉伯采纳国际最佳实践。医疗器械制造商和进口商应留意，未来SFDA指南可能越来越多地引用AAMI标准，从而影响产品认证与合规。目前尚未宣布即时监管变更，但建议相关方密切关注SFDA的动态以应对潜在新要求。

title.en: "الغذاء والدواء" تواصل ترسيخ مكانتها العالمية بتنظيم دراسات سريرية لأجهزة ومستلزمات طبية مبتكرة

title.en: SFDA NCMDR Weekly Safety Update WU2627 (June 28, 2026)
title.zh: 沙特SFDA NCMDR第WU2627期每周医疗器械安全更新

summary.en: The Saudi Food and Drug Authority's National Center for Medical Devices Reporting (NCMDR) issued Weekly Update WU2627, covering safety alerts and adverse event reports for medical devices distributed in the Kingdom. The report identifies specific devices and manufacturers with reported safety issues, and recommends that healthcare providers review the findings and take necessary corrective or preventive actions as indicated in the update.
summary.zh: 沙特食品药品监管局国家医疗器械报告中心发布WU2627期每周安全更新，通报了在沙特境内流通的医疗器械相关安全警示和不良事件报告。该更新列出了受影响的器械及制造商，并要求医疗机构查阅报告内容并采取相应的纠正或预防措施。

title.en: SFDA NCMDR Weekly Safety Update WU2626 (21 June 2026)
title.zh: 沙特SFDA NCMDR每周安全更新报告WU2626（2026年6月21日）

summary.en: The Saudi Food and Drug Authority’s National Center for Medical Devices Reporting (NCMDR) released weekly update WU2626 on 21 June 2026, containing recent medical device field safety notices and adverse event reports. Healthcare providers, authorized representatives, and distributors should review the listed manufacturers and devices, and promptly apply any recommended corrective actions to ensure ongoing compliance and patient safety.
summary.zh: 沙特食品药品监督管理局国家医疗器械报告中心（NCMDR）于2026年6月21日发布每周更新报告WU2626，涵盖近期医疗器械现场安全通告及不良事件报告。各医疗机构、授权代表及经销商须查阅所列制造商与器械，并立即采取建议的纠正措施，以确保持续合规和患者安全。

title.en: SFDA NCMDR Weekly Update WU2625 (14 June 2026) Medical Device Safety Report
title.zh: 沙特SFDA NCMDR每周更新WU2625（2026年6月14日）医疗器械安全报告

summary.en: The Saudi FDA National Center for Medical Devices Reporting (NCMDR) published Weekly Update WU2625, summarizing recent medical device field safety notices, recalls, and adverse event reports. Healthcare professionals and facilities should review the listed affected devices and manufacturers for any required corrective actions. The report emphasizes continued vigilance and prompt reporting of adverse events through the NCMDR system.
summary.zh: 沙特食药监局国家医疗器械报告中心（NCMDR）发布每周更新WU2625，汇总了近期医疗器械现场安全通告、召回及不良事件报告。医疗机构和专业人员应查阅报告中涉及的受影响器械及制造商，并采取必要的纠正措施。报告强调保持警惕，及时通过NCMDR系统上报不良事件。

title.en: SFDA NCMDR Weekly Safety Update WU2624 Released on 07 June 2026
title.zh: SFDA NCMDR发布第WU2624期每周安全更新（2026年6月7日）

summary.en: The Saudi Food and Drug Authority’s National Center for Medical Devices Reporting (NCMDR) issued Weekly Update WU2624 on 07 June 2026. The report includes recent safety alerts for medical devices, identifying affected products and manufacturers. Healthcare providers and suppliers are advised to review the specific advisories and implement any corrective actions to maintain patient safety.
summary.zh: 沙特食品药品管理局国家医疗器械报告中心（NCMDR）于2026年6月7日发布了第WU2624期每周安全更新。该报告包含近期的医疗器械安全警示，列明了受影响的产品和制造商。医疗机构和供应商应查阅相关警示，并采取必要的纠正措施以确保患者安全。

title.en: SFDA NCMDR Weekly Safety Update WU2622 – 24 May 2026
title.zh: 沙特FDA NCMDR每周安全更新WU2622（2026年5月24日）

summary.en: The Saudi FDA's National Center for Medical Devices Reporting (NCMDR) published weekly update WU2622 on 24 May 2026, consolidating recent medical device safety alerts, field safety notices, and recalls. Affected devices and manufacturers are listed in the report; healthcare providers and suppliers in Saudi Arabia must review the notice, check inventories, and implement any recommended corrective actions immediately to ensure patient safety and regulatory compliance.
summary.zh: 沙特食品药品监督管理局（SFDA）国家医疗器械报告中心（NCMDR）于2026年5月24日发布了第WU2622期每周安全更新，汇总了近期的医疗器械安全警报、现场安全通知和召回信息。报告中列出了受影响的器械和制造商，沙特的医疗机构和供应商必须立即查阅通告、核实库存，并执行建议的纠正措施，以保障患者安全与法规合规性。
